title: Arena Animation is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Arena Animation is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
